channel.title: Fred Francis 2028 — Campaign Updates
channel.description: Updates from the Fred Francis 2028 campaign: new policy proposals, whitepapers, and site changes.

item.title: Campaign website rebuilt and relaunched
item.description: The Fred Francis 2028 campaign site has been rebuilt as a fast, fully indexable website with real pages for every issue, an accountability framework, and a way to make your voice heard on every proposal.
